title: Payroll Schedule and Accessing Pay Stubs
text:
Q: What is the payroll schedule and how can I access my pay stubs?
A: Our payroll is processed bi-weekly, with paydays occurring every other Friday. Employees will receive their paychecks or direct deposits on these scheduled dates. To access your pay stubs, log in to the Employee Portal using your credentials. Once logged in, navigate to the 'Payroll' section and select 'Pay Stubs' from the menu. Here, you can view, download, and print your pay stubs for the current and previous pay periods. If you encounter any issues accessing your pay stubs or have questions regarding your payroll, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com or call us at (555) 123-4567 during business hours. Remember to keep your login information secure to protect your personal financial information.
